data.name: Rise of a Porn Star
data.detailed_description:
Rise of a Porn Star is a sandbox style Erotic Game, where you play as Daisy Donahue, a part-time bikini model who loves sex. With the encouragement of her friend Claire, she takes on jobs that are more adventurous, to advance her career and feed her amazing sexual appetite. Before long, Daisy goes from a cute model shaking her ass on a beach, to world-renowned porn star having hot, steamy sex on film, every chance she gets.

Rise of a Porn Star contains more than 40 levels of gameplay, where you control all of the action. From simple modeling performances to full-on group sex scenes, you control the wardrobe, the location, the positions, the lighting and more.


As you complete each level you earn money to purchase clothes and accessories, and notoriety points, which lead to more and more exciting "Jobs" for Daisy to take on. As she performs, she earns experience points as well, that she can use to learn new poses and sexual positions.

This fun and sexy erotic game contains:
• Over 60 poses and sexual positions to learn and perform.
• Over 100 clothing items to purchase and equip during each job.
• Over 40 "Jobs", from simple modeling shoots to hard-core porn performances.
• Simple character customization, including hair styles, body sizes and shapes, and skin features.
• Special "Invitation only" scenes where Daisy is invited by film directors, porn stars and "secret groups" to perform and earn special wardrobe items and achievements.
• Text-based scenarios for each job, setting the scene for each of Daisy's performances.
• Free-play mode after completion of the game, where any kind of performance can be completed at any location.


If you like hot, steamy sexual gameplay action, and being in control like never before, then this game is for you.

data.short_description: Rise of a Porn Star is a sandbox style Erotic Game with more than 40 steamy levels of gameplay and over 60 sexual poses and positions to learn. You control all of the action as Daisy starts a career in adult films, going from bikini model to world-renowned Porn Star.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 4590 or better
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X 11 GPU w/ 4GB
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 14 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7 4500 or better
  • 記憶體: 12 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X 11 GPU w/ 6GB
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 14 GB 可用空間
